faqs.label: 🕐 Library hours
faqs.question: What are the library hours?
faqs.content:
CHS Library (Carlatan, San Fernando City, La Union): Monday to Friday 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM (no noon break), Saturday 8:30 AM - 4:30 PM, Sunday and holidays Closed.

CLI Library (Urbiztondo, San Juan, La Union): Monday to Friday 7:30 AM - 5:00 PM (no noon break), Saturday, Sunday and holidays Closed.

High School Library: Monday to Friday 8:30 AM - 4:30 PM, Saturday, Sunday and holidays Closed.

Preschool and Grade School Library: Monday to Friday 8:30 AM - 4:30 PM, Saturday, Sunday and holidays Closed.

faqs.label: 📧 Library email
faqs.question: What is the library email address?
faqs.content:
CHS Library: chslibrary@lorma.edu
CLI Library: clilibrary@lorma.edu

faqs.label: 📖 Borrowing privileges
faqs.question: What are the borrowing privileges?
faqs.content:
Higher Education Faculty: Maximum of 5 books for 1 month, renewable if there is no demand from other users.

Higher Education Students: Maximum of 2 books for 1 week, renewable if there is no demand from other users.

faqs.label: 💸 Overdue fines
faqs.question: What are the overdue fines?
faqs.content:
Higher Education Faculty: Php 20.00 per day per book.

Higher Education Students: Php 12.00 per day per book.

faqs.label: 🖨️ Printing rates
faqs.question: What are the printing rates?
faqs.content:
Short/A4 bond paper:
- Black & White (pure text): Php 2.00
- With colored text or illustration: Php 5.00
- Full Page Colored: Php 10.00

Long bond paper:
- Black & White (pure text): Php 3.00
- With colored text or illustration: Php 7.00
- Full Page Colored: Php 12.00

A printing card costs Php 100.00 and can be purchased at the business office.

faqs.label: 📄 Printing procedure
faqs.question: How do I print documents?
faqs.content:
1. Purchase a printing card at the business office (Php 100.00).
2. Send your PDF to the official library email.
3. Library personnel reviews the document.
4. Library personnel prints the documents.
5. Fill out the Printing Monitoring Form.
6. Library personnel sends a notification for pick-up through email.
7. Library personnel releases the printouts.
